message:
fix: resolve compilation errors and improve TcpStream split

TcpStream split improvements:
- Make TcpStreamInner pub(crate) to fix visibility warning
- Use Self instead of explicit type name for clippy

Process module fixes (pre-existing errors from other agents):
- Fix partial move by using take() instead of direct map()
- Fix initialize_unfilled() -> unfilled() method name
- Fix temp value dropped while borrowed in test
- Fix cannot move out of Drop type by removing redundant drop
- Remove unused imports and prefix unused variable

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
